title: Split SQL by Size vs Lines: Which Is Better?
description: Both methods work, but each is better for different import tools and limits.
author: SQLSplit

content.text: You can split by lines or by file size. The right choice depends on your import target.
phpMyAdmin and shared hosting have strict upload limits. Size‑based splits are safest.
Line‑based splits are useful for predictable chunk sizes in CLI imports.
Related: **How to Split a mysqldump File Into Smaller Parts**.

content.title: Choose the right split mode
content.text: Use size for phpMyAdmin, lines for CLI.

faq.question: Does SQLSplit preserve SQL structure in both modes?
faq.answer: Yes. It keeps statements intact either way.
